void.string: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns1="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:mytext="mytext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext mytext rounding sringindex strings"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <GetLegalIDRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/GetLegalIDRp/ErrorCode"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/GetLegalIDRp/ErrorMsg"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <CifNo> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/GetLegalIDRp/CifNo"></xsl:value-of> </CifNo> <FullName> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/GetLegalIDRp/FullName"></xsl:value-of> </FullName> <IDNumber> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/GetLegalIDRp/IDNumber"></xsl:value-of> </IDNumber> <BranchCode> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/GetLegalIDRp/BranchCode"></xsl:value-of> </BranchCode> <Residence> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/GetLegalIDRp/Residence"></xsl:value-of> </Residence> <CustomerType> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/GetLegalIDRp/CustomerType"></xsl:value-of> </CustomerType> <Sex> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/GetLegalIDRp/Sex"></xsl:value-of> </Sex> <Birthday> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/GetLegalIDRp/Birthday"></xsl:value-of> </Birthday> <Email> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/GetLegalIDRp/Email"></xsl:value-of> </Email> <Address> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/GetLegalIDRp/Address"></xsl:value-of> </Address> <ContactMobile> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/GetLegalIDRp/ContactMobile"></xsl:value-of> </ContactMobile> </GetLegalIDRp> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="GetLegalIDRp"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorMsg" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CifNo" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="FullName" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="IDNumber" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="BranchCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Residence" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CustomerType" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Sex" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Birthday" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Email" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Address" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="ContactMobile" type="xsd:string"/>
</xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="GetLegalIDRp"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorMsg" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CifNo" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="FullName" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="IDNumber" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="BranchCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Residence" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CustomerType" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Sex" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Birthday" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Email" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Address" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="ContactMobile" type="xsd:string"/>
</xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>
